message:
test(fcp-core): add comprehensive zone crypto unit tests

Add 10 new unit tests for zone key management:
- rotation_chain_three_epochs: verify 3-epoch key chain with prev_zone_key_id linkage
- manifest_replay_is_idempotent: ensure reapplying manifest doesn't corrupt state
- membership_change_node_addition: test adding new nodes to zone membership
- manifest_with_valid_until: test expiration field handling
- manifest_with_xchacha20_poly1305: test XChaCha20 algorithm selection
- key_id_formatting: verify ZoneKeyId/ObjectIdKeyId Display/Debug formatting
- zone_key_debug_is_redacted: ensure secret key material not leaked in debug output
- set_active_key_unknown_returns_false: test unknown key handling
- wrapped_key_for_missing_recipient: test missing recipient lookup

Total zone_keys tests: 18 (all passing)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
